items.name: pipod
items.description: Run the pi coding agent inside an isolated Docker container, one persistent container per workspace. A single bash script builds the image, manages per-workspace containers (with optional network isolation), bind-mounts config and sessions, and handles UID/GID mapping so files stay host-owned. All state lives on the host under ~/.pi/pipod/

items.name: Elite-Drop
items.description: Experience the fastest way to share files locally! Elite Drop lets you send photos, videos, and large documents from your phone to any PC or smartphone instantly. With a beautiful interactive dashboard and seamless background sharing.
